changelog:
THE SOCIAL SIGNAL UPDATE (v7.2):
- [SOCIAL] Signal Resonance: Introduced the '[ 📻 ROGER THAT ]' tactical resonance button for decentralized P2P interactions without heavy replies, complete with Anti-Spam Ping mitigation.
- [SYSTEM] The Memory Vault: Added a dedicated Bookmarks vault (bookmarks.php) powered by INNER JOIN architecture, automatically purging saved posts if the origin node executes a Global Purge or Ghost Protocol.
- [SECURITY] Symmetric Key Exchange: Annihilated the 401 Spoofing Paradox bug by enforcing a bi-directional Handshake Token sync during the follow sequence, ensuring perfect cryptographic alignment.
